sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the source file

demo_only.description: True if this is a demo/test document, not an official source

allowed_for_citation.description: True if this document may be cited in user-facing responses

permitted_for_health_context.description: True if this document may be used for health-evidence context

permitted_for_indian_aqi_thresholds.description: True if this document may modify Indian AQI thresholds (should be false for non-Indian sources)

permitted_for_legal_context.description: True if this document may be used for legal/regulatory context

permitted_for_city_context.description: True if this document may be used for city-level context

permitted_for_investigation_hypothesis_c.description: True if this document may support investigation hypotheses

permitted_for_source_attribution.description: True if this document may be used for source-level attribution (should be false for most sources)

permitted_for_legal_conclusion.description: True if this document may support legal conclusions (should be false for most sources)

legal_context_only.description: True if this document is for general regulatory context only, not legal advice

required_disclaimer.description: Exact disclaimer text required when this source is used

permitted_for_compliance_verdict.description: True if this document may be used to determine compliance (should be false for most sources)

permitted_for_violation_claim.description: True if this document may be used to claim a violation (should be false for most sources)

permitted_for_penalty_claim.description: True if this document may be used to predict penalties (should be false for most sources)
